> Type system engine for TiddlyWiki -- schema definitions via tiddler fields

Define schemas via tiddler fields, validate instances, and create new typed tiddlers through a spawner UI.

## Key features

* **Type definitions** -- define schemas with `rrt.type` and `rrt.fields` on tiddler fields
* **Field definitions** -- validation rules, typed editors, calculated fields
* **Validator** -- UI to check all instances against their type schemas (see Validator tab)
* **Spawner** -- UI to create new typed tiddler instances (see Spawner tab)
* **Field editor** -- type-aware input controls for editing typed fields
* **Inheritance** -- parent types for shared field definitions
* **Custom filters** -- `rrfunc` filter functions for type system queries
* **Inline field bar** -- compact editable field display for embedding in app views
* **Filter panel** -- auto-generated filter UI from field definitions (text search, enum pills, reference pills)
* **Filter summary** -- compact button with active filter count badge, opens filter panel in popup
* **`rrt-filter` operator** -- JS filter operator for generic type-aware list filtering

## Prerequisites

No external prerequisites.

## Quick start

Define a type tiddler with `rrt.type` and field definitions. Use the Spawner tab to create instances. Use the Validator tab to check for schema violations across all typed tiddlers.

## Plugin Library

Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*.

## Demo

Try this plugin in the [live demo wiki](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-demo/).

<$fill $name="body">

!! Schema model

|!Schema element |!Discovery filter |!Key fields |
|Type |`[rrt.type[type]]` |key, icon, parent, upref, `rrt.fields:0()` |
|Field |`[rrt.type[field]]` |key, typed, constraints, validity |
|Enum |`[rrt.type[enum]]` |key, parent, `rrt.options:0()` |

!! Inheritance

Single parent via `parent` field. Base type `_node` defines common fields + aggregator `rrt.fields()`. Subtypes add `rrt.fields:1()` and optionally `:2`. Same pattern for enums (`rrt.options:0`/`:1`/`:2`).

!! Field resolution

* Multiple field tiddlers can share the same `key`
* `validity` field restricts a definition to specific types (most-specific wins)
* `typed` controls the editor: `text`, `date`, `enum:<key>`, type keys (object refs), `$title`, `$calculated`

!! Constraints

|!Constraint |!Meaning |
|`n:1` |Single select |
|`!N+` |Min N required (blocking) |
|`N+` |Min N required (warning) |
|`!u` |Unique wiki-wide (blocking) |
|`u` |Unique wiki-wide (warning) |
|`filter` |Title computation formula |

!! Shared infrastructure

* ''functions.tid'' — all shared functions: field lookup (`_locate_rrt`), validation, helpers
* ''field-editor.tid'' — reusable per-field editor template (handles enum/text/date/object + validation)

!! UI components

* ''Spawner flow'': select type → `$importvariables` pulls functions + type + parent → `rrt.fields()` merges all levels → per field: locate definition, render editor (or `$title`/`$calculated` special handling)
* ''Validator flow'': per non-abstract type → per instance: check min/unique/title/calculated constraints → red (blocking) or orange (warning)
* ''Field Bar flow'': only for tiddlers with `rrt.type` field → per field: compact cell (icon + truncated value), click opens popup with `field-editor`

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">Uniqueness constraints (`!u`/`u`) are wiki-wide — they check all tiddlers, not just same-type instances.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! Plugin files

|!File |!Role |
|`functions.tid` |Shared function definitions |
|`field-editor.tid` |Reusable per-field editor template |
|`Spawner.tid` |Create/edit UI |
|`viewtemplate-fields.tid` |Field Bar (ViewTemplate segment) |
|`viewtemplate-styles.tid` |Field Bar CSS |
|`Validator.tid` |Wiki-wide validation report |
|`validator-styles.tid` |Validator CSS |
|`TypeSystemOverview.tid` |Admin overview |
|`modules/filters/rrfunc.js` |Safe function-call filter operator |

!! Restart rules

|!Change |!Restart needed? |
|Edit Spawner/Validator/TypeSystemOverview |No — filesystem-watcher syncs |
|Edit `rrfunc.js` |Yes — JS module |
|Add/delete `.tid` files |Yes — directory scan at boot |
|Add domain type/field/enum in another plugin |Yes — shadow tiddlers |

!! Defining a type

# Create `.tid` in domain plugin (e.g., `orga/typed/types/mytype.tid`)
# Required fields: `key`, `rrt.type: type`, `title`
# Optional: `parent` (inheritance), `icon`, `upref`, `caption`
# Define `rrt.fields:1()` in body for extra fields
# Restart server

!! Defining a field

# Create `.tid` with `key`, `rrt.type: field`, `typed` (editor type)
# Optional: `constraints`, `validity` (type-specific override)
# Add field key to parent type's `rrt.fields:1()` function
# Restart server

!! Type-specific field override

Create a second field tiddler with same `key` + `validity: <type-key>`. The `typed` value can differ (e.g., restrict parent references to specific types).

!! Defining an enum

# Base: create `.tid` with `key`, `rrt.type: enum`, define `rrt.options:0()`
# Child: set `parent` field, add `rrt.options:1()` for additional options
# Reference from field with `typed: enum:<key>`
# Restart server

!! Known limitations

* 3-level inheritance cap (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) — TW issue #9647 prevents dynamic slot discovery
* `$importvariables` is deprecated but necessary for dynamic type selection
* No built-in `truncate` filter operator — Field Bar uses `splitregexp` + `first` + `join`

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">The typed plugin is the engine only. Domain-specific types, fields, and enums belong in separate plugins (e.g., the orga plugin).</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! Define a type with fields

Type tiddler (`typed/types/widget.tid`):

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/types/widget
rrt.type: type
key: widget
caption: Widget
icon: ⚙️
parent: _node
upref: w

\function rrt.fields:1() color size
```

Field tiddler (`typed/fields/color.tid`):

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/color
rrt.type: field
key: color
caption: Color
typed: enum:colors
constraints: !1+
```

!! Type-specific field override

Base field allows any parent:

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/parent
rrt.type: field
key: parent
typed: _node
constraints: !1+
```

Override restricts widgets to only have `dashboard` parents:

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/widget_parent
rrt.type: field
key: parent
typed: dashboard
constraints: !1+
validity: widget
```

!! Nesting limit (`nest:N`)

A `parent` field that references the same type can cause infinite nesting chains. Use `nest:N` to cap the depth. With `nest:1`, a note can have a note as parent, but that parent note cannot itself be a child of another note.

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/fields/note_parent
rrt.type: field
key: parent
typed: note
constraints: n:1 nest:1
validity: note
```

The validator reports a blocking error when the chain exceeds the limit. The field editor automatically excludes tiddlers that are already at max depth from the parent picker, so users cannot create an invalid chain in the first place.

!! Define an enum

Base enum:

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/enums/colors
rrt.type: enum
key: colors
caption: Colors

\function rrt.options:0() red green blue
```

Extended enum (inherits parent options + adds more):

```
title: $:/plugins/myplugin/typed/enums/ext-colors
rrt.type: enum
key: colors
parent: colors

\function rrt.options:1() yellow purple
```

Result: the `colors` enum has options `red green blue yellow purple`.

!! Spawner usage

# Open the Spawner tiddler (`$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner`)
# Select a type from the dropdown — fields load dynamically via `$importvariables`
# Fill in the required fields (blocking constraints shown in red)
# The title field auto-computes if the type defines a `$title` + `filter` constraint
# Click "Create" — the new tiddler is created with all fields set

!! Validator interpretation

Open the Validator (`$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator`). For each type:

* ''Red entries'' (`!` prefix constraints): blocking — data must be fixed
* ''Orange entries'' (no prefix): warnings — recommended but not required
* Common checks: missing required fields (`!1+`), duplicate abbreviations (`!u`), invalid parent references

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/faq","created":"20260305110750640","modified":"20260305110750640","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Q: Why rrfunc instead of the native function[] operator?

Native `function[]` leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined — it returns the title of the tiddler being filtered instead of an empty result. `rrfunc` checks `isFunctionDefinition` first and returns `[]` if undefined. This is critical for inheritance where `rrt.fields:1` or `:2` may not exist on base types.

!! Q: Why is there a 3-level inheritance limit?

TW issue #9647 prevents dynamic iteration over function names (calling `rrt.fields:N` for variable N). The numbered slot pattern (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) is hardcoded because there's no way to dynamically discover how many levels exist.

!! Q: How do I add a new field editor type?

Edit `field-editor.tid` and add an `<%if%>` branch for your new `typed` value. The editor template dispatches on the `typed` field of the field definition tiddler. Built-in types: `text`, `date`, `enum:<key>`, type keys (object refs), `$title`, `$calculated`.

!! Q: What's the difference between blocking and warning constraints?

Blocking constraints (prefixed with `!`, e.g., `!1+`, `!u`) show red in the Validator and indicate data that must be fixed. Warning constraints (no prefix, e.g., `1+`, `u`) show orange and indicate recommendations. Both are checked wiki-wide by the Validator.

!! Q: How does title generation work?

When a field has `typed: $title` and `constraints: filter`, the constraint value is a TW filter expression. For example: `[get[parent]] [<type-tid>get[upref]] [get[abbrev]] +[join[]]` computes a title from parent, type prefix, and abbreviation fields. The Spawner evaluates this filter and sets the title automatically.

</$fill>
</$transclude>

<$fill $name="body">

!! What it does

Type system engine for TiddlyWiki. Schema definitions (types, fields, enums) are tiddlers discovered by the `rrt.type` field. No central registry — any plugin can contribute type definitions.

!! Features

* ''Schema-as-tiddlers'' — types, fields, and enums defined via tiddler fields (`rrt.type`)
* ''Discovery'' — `[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]` finds all types automatically
* ''Inheritance'' — single parent via `parent` field, 3-level slot system (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`)
* ''Spawner'' — create/edit UI, renders editors per field type
* ''Field Bar'' — compact inline bar in ViewTemplate, per-field popup editor + validation
* ''Validator'' — wiki-wide constraint report (min counts, uniqueness, computed titles)
* ''TypeSystemOverview'' — admin view of all types, fields, and enums
* ''Custom operator'' — `rrfunc` safely calls functions (returns empty if undefined, unlike native `function[]`)

!! Schema model

* ''Type tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: type`) — entity kinds with key, icon, parent, title prefix
* ''Field tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: field`) — properties with data types and constraints
* ''Enum tiddlers'' (`rrt.type: enum`) — fixed option sets with inheritance

!! Prerequisites

TiddlyWiki running in Node.js server mode

!! Quick start

# Define a type tiddler with `rrt.type: type`, `key: mytype`, and a `rrt.fields:0()` function
# Define field tiddlers with `rrt.type: field`, `key: fieldname`, `typed: text`
# Use the Spawner to create instances
# Field Bar appears automatically on typed tiddlers in view mode

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning">
<$fill $name="body">Do not replace `rrfunc` with native `function[]`. The native operator leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined — `rrfunc` checks `isFunctionDefinition` and returns empty.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/reference","created":"20260305110750641","modified":"20260305110750641","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Type tiddler fields

|!Field |!Required |!Description |
|`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `type` |
|`key` |Yes |Unique type identifier |
|`caption` |No |Display name |
|`icon` |No |Emoji or icon reference |
|`parent` |No |Parent type key (for inheritance) |
|`upref` |No |Prefix for generated titles (e.g., `p` for project) |

Body defines `rrt.fields:0()` (base) or `rrt.fields:1()` (subtype) — space-separated field keys.

!! Field tiddler fields

|!Field |!Required |!Description |
|`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `field` |
|`key` |Yes |Field identifier (matches tiddler field name) |
|`caption` |No |Display name |
|`icon` |No |Emoji or icon |
|`typed` |Yes |Editor type (see table below) |
|`constraints` |No |Validation rules (see table below) |
|`validity` |No |Restrict definition to specific type key |

!! Enum tiddler fields

|!Field |!Required |!Description |
|`rrt.type` |Yes |Must be `enum` |
|`key` |Yes |Enum identifier |
|`parent` |No |Parent enum key |
|`caption` |No |Display name |

Body defines `rrt.options:0()` (base) or `rrt.options:1()` (child) — space-separated option values.

!! `typed` values

|!Value |!Editor |!Description |
|`text` |Text input |Free-form text |
|`date` |Date picker |Date value |
|`enum:<key>` |Pills (single/multi) |Enum selection |
|`<type-key>` |Object reference pills |Reference to typed tiddlers |
|`$title` |Computed |Auto-generated title |
|`$calculated` |Computed |Auto-calculated field |

!! Constraint syntax

|!Syntax |!Type |!Meaning |
|`n:1` |Selection |Single select (not multi) |
|`!N+` |Blocking |Minimum N values required |
|`N+` |Warning |Minimum N values recommended |
|`!u` |Blocking |Unique wiki-wide |
|`u` |Warning |Unique wiki-wide (soft) |
|`nest:N` |Blocking |Max N levels of same-type nesting |
|`filter` |Computation |Title generation formula (with `$title`) |

!! rrfunc filter operator

Usage: `[rrfunc[functionName]]` or `[rrfunc[functionName],[arg]]`

Safely calls a TW function by name. Returns `[]` if the function is undefined (unlike native `function[]` which leaks titles).

!! Key functions (functions.tid)

|!Function |!Purpose |
|`rrt.fields()` |Aggregates `:0` + `:1` + `:2` field lists |
|`rrt.options()` |Aggregates `:0` + `:1` + `:2` enum options |
|`_locate_rrt(key, type)` |Finds most-specific field/enum definition (respects `validity`) |
|`_get-nest-limit(field-key, type-key)` |Extracts the numeric limit from a `nest:N` constraint |
|`_field-nest-blocks(field-key, type-key)` |Returns blocking violations when nesting depth exceeds `nest:N` |
|`_nest-excluded-parents(field-key, type-key)` |Lists same-type tiddlers already at max nesting depth (excluded from parent picker) |

!! State tiddlers

|!Pattern |!Purpose |
|`$:/state/rimir/typed/spawner/*` |Spawner UI state |
|`$:/state/rimir/typed/field-editor/*` |Field editor popup state |

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110750641","modified":"20260305110750641","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"typed","rdt.plugin-name":"typed","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Type system engine — schema definitions via tiddler fields","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! rrfunc operator

Safely calls TW functions by name. Checks `isFunctionDefinition` before calling, returns empty array `[]` if undefined. Critical for inheritance where `rrt.fields:1`/`:2` may not exist on base types.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger">
<$fill $name="body">Native `function[]` leaks tiddler titles when the function is undefined. Always use `rrfunc` in the type system.</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! $importvariables

Pulls functions/procedures from filter-matched tiddlers into scope. Used for:

* Shared functions import (from `functions.tid`)
* Dynamic type + parent import (for `rrt.fields`/`rrt.options` aggregators)
* Deprecated by TW but no `\import` alternative for computed filters

!! Discovery via custom fields

The `rrt.type` field serves as a registration mechanism. `[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]` discovers types without a central registry. Works across shadows (plugin tiddlers) and regular tiddlers.

!! Function definitions in bodies

`\function` at tiddler body start defines a callable function. `$importvariables` brings it into scope. `code-body: yes` field tells TW to treat the entire body as definitions.

!! TW issue #9647

Prevents dynamic iteration over function names (e.g., calling `rrt.fields:N` for variable N). This is why the numbered slot pattern (`:0`/`:1`/`:2`) is hardcoded to 3 levels.

!! Field value analysis

`_other-field-entries` function checks all tiddlers wiki-wide for uniqueness constraints, not just same-type instances.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">`$importvariables` is deprecated but remains the only way to import functions from a computed filter expression (where the tiddler title is determined at runtime).</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/field-bar-inline":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/field-bar-inline","created":"20260323140000000","modified":"20260323140000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim

<!-- Inline field-bar for use in app views.
     Parameters (set via $let before transcluding):
       target-tid — the tiddler to show/edit fields for
     Renders the same field-bar as ViewTemplate but without requiring ViewTemplate context.
-->

title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrfunc.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: filteroperator

Filter operator returning those input titles that are returned from a function

\*/

"use strict";

/*
Export our filter function
*/
exports.rrfunc = function(source,operator,options) {
	var functionName = operator.operands[0],
		params = [],
		results;
	$tw.utils.each(operator.operands.slice(1),function(param) {
		params.push({value: param});
	});
	// console.log(`Calling ${functionName} with params ${JSON.stringify(params)}`);
	var variableInfo = options.widget && options.widget.getVariableInfo && options.widget.getVariableInfo(functionName,{params: params, source: source});
	if(variableInfo && variableInfo.srcVariable && variableInfo.srcVariable.isFunctionDefinition) {
		results = variableInfo.resultList ? variableInfo.resultList : [variableInfo.text];
	}
	// console.log(`function ${functionName} with params ${JSON.stringify(params)} results: ${JSON.stringify(results)}`);
	return results || [];
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"filteroperator","created":"20260210073745285","modified":"20260305110750643"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrt-filter.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrt-filter.js","text":"/*\
title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrt-filter.js
type: application/javascript
module-type: filteroperator

Generic filter operator for typed entities.
Keeps input titles that match all active filters stored at a filter-state base path.

Usage: [rrt-filter<filter-state>]

Requires variables in scope:
  type-key — the rrt.type key (e.g. "task")

Filter state convention:
  <filter-state>/<field-key> — tiddler whose text field contains the filter value
  - text fields: substring match (triggers at 3+ chars)
  - enum fields: space-separated selected values (match any)
  - reference fields: space-separated selected titles (match any)

\*/

"use strict";

exports["rrt-filter"] = function(source, operator, options) {
	var filterState = operator.operand,
		wiki = options.wiki,
		widget = options.widget,
		results = [];

	if(!filterState || !widget) {
		source(function(tiddler, title) { results.push(title); });
		return results;
	}

	// Get type-key from variable scope
	var typeKey = widget.getVariable("type-key");
	if(!typeKey) {
		source(function(tiddler, title) { results.push(title); });
		return results;
	}

	// Find the type tiddler and get its fields
	var typeTiddlers = wiki.filterTiddlers("[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]key[" + typeKey + "]]");
	if(typeTiddlers.length === 0) {
		source(function(tiddler, title) { results.push(title); });
		return results;
	}
	var typeTid = typeTiddlers[0];

	// Resolve fields via rrt.fields function (aggregated from type + parent)
	var fieldsStr = "";
	var variableInfo = widget.getVariableInfo("rrt.fields", {params: [], source: function(callback) {}});
	if(variableInfo && variableInfo.resultList) {
		fieldsStr = variableInfo.resultList.join(" ");
	} else if(variableInfo && variableInfo.text) {
		fieldsStr = variableInfo.text;
	}
	var fieldKeys = fieldsStr.split(/\s+/).filter(function(f) { return f.length > 0; });

	// Build active filters: collect field-keys that have non-blank filter values
	var activeFilters = [];
	fieldKeys.forEach(function(fieldKey) {
		var stateTiddlerTitle = filterState + "/" + fieldKey;
		var stateTiddler = wiki.getTiddler(stateTiddlerTitle);
		if(stateTiddler) {
			var filterValue = (stateTiddler.fields.text || "").trim();
			if(filterValue.length > 0) {
				// Look up field definition to determine typed
				var fieldTids = wiki.filterTiddlers("[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[field]key[" + fieldKey + "]]");
				var typed = "text";
				if(fieldTids.length > 0) {
					var fieldTid = wiki.getTiddler(fieldTids[0]);
					if(fieldTid) {
						typed = (fieldTid.fields.typed || "text").trim();
					}
				}
				activeFilters.push({
					fieldKey: fieldKey,
					filterValue: filterValue,
					typed: typed
				});
			}
		}
	});

	// If no active filters, pass everything through
	if(activeFilters.length === 0) {
		source(function(tiddler, title) { results.push(title); });
		return results;
	}

	// Check each input title against all active filters
	source(function(tiddler, title) {
		if(!tiddler) {
			tiddler = wiki.getTiddler(title);
		}
		if(!tiddler) return;

		var pass = true;
		for(var i = 0; i < activeFilters.length; i++) {
			var af = activeFilters[i];
			var itemValue = (tiddler.fields[af.fieldKey] || "").toString().trim();

			if(af.typed === "text") {
				// Text: substring search, only if filter is 3+ chars
				if(af.filterValue.length >= 3) {
					if(itemValue.toLowerCase().indexOf(af.filterValue.toLowerCase()) === -1) {
						pass = false;
						break;
					}
				}
			} else if(af.typed.indexOf("enum:") === 0) {
				// Enum: item value must be one of the selected values
				var selected = af.filterValue.split(/\s+/);
				if(selected.indexOf(itemValue) === -1) {
					pass = false;
					break;
				}
			} else if(af.typed === "date") {
				// Skip date filters for now
			} else {
				// Reference field: item value (may be space-separated list) must contain at least one selected
				var selectedRefs = af.filterValue.split(/\s+/);
				var itemRefs = itemValue.split(/\s+/);
				var hasMatch = selectedRefs.some(function(ref) {
					return itemRefs.indexOf(ref) !== -1;
				});
				if(!hasMatch) {
					pass = false;
					break;
				}
			}
		}

		if(pass) {
			results.push(title);
		}
	});

	return results;
};
","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"filteroperator"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/readme","created":"20260305110750644","modified":"20260305110750644","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! typed

Type system engine for TiddlyWiki. Define schemas via tiddler fields, validate instances, and create new typed tiddlers through a spawner UI.

!! Key features

* ''Type definitions'' — define schemas with `rrt.type` and `rrt.fields` on tiddler fields
* ''Field definitions'' — validation rules, typed editors, calculated fields
* ''Validator'' — UI to check all instances against their type schemas (see Validator tab)
* ''Spawner'' — UI to create new typed tiddler instances (see Spawner tab)
* ''Field editor'' — type-aware input controls for editing typed fields
* ''Inheritance'' — parent types for shared field definitions
* ''Custom filters'' — `rrfunc` filter functions for type system queries
* ''Inline field bar'' — compact editable field display for embedding in app views
* ''Filter panel'' — auto-generated filter UI from field definitions (text search, enum pills, reference pills)
* ''Filter summary'' — compact button with active filter count badge, opens filter panel in popup
* ''`rrt-filter` operator'' — JS filter operator for generic type-aware list filtering

!! Prerequisites

No external prerequisites.

!! Quick start

title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-rrfunc.js
type: application/javascript
tags: [[$:/tags/test-spec]]

Tests for typed rrfunc filter operator.

\*/
"use strict";

describe("typed: rrfunc filter operator", function() {

	var rrfuncModule;

	beforeEach(function() {
		rrfuncModule = require("$:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrfunc.js");
	});

	it("should export the rrfunc function", function() {
		expect(rrfuncModule.rrfunc).toBeDefined();
		expect(typeof rrfuncModule.rrfunc).toBe("function");
	});

	it("should return empty array when widget is null", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]};
		var options = {widget: null};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual([]);
	});

	it("should return empty array when widget is undefined", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]};
		var options = {};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual([]);
	});

	it("should return empty array when widget has no getVariableInfo", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["someFunc"]};
		var options = {widget: {getVariable: function() { return undefined; }}};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual([]);
	});

	it("should return empty array when getVariableInfo returns no srcVariable", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]};
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					return {text: "hello"};
				}
			}
		};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual([]);
	});

	it("should return empty array when srcVariable is not a function definition", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]};
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					return {
						text: "hello",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: false}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual([]);
	});

	it("should return resultList when function definition provides it", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]};
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					return {
						text: "first",
						resultList: ["alpha", "beta", "gamma"],
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual(["alpha", "beta", "gamma"]);
	});

	it("should return [text] when no resultList is present", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["myFunc"]};
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					return {
						text: "single-result",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		var result = rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(result).toEqual(["single-result"]);
	});

	it("should pass operands as params to getVariableInfo", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["myFunc", "arg1", "arg2"]};
		var capturedParams;
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					capturedParams = opts.params;
					return {
						text: "result",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(capturedParams).toEqual([{value: "arg1"}, {value: "arg2"}]);
	});

	it("should pass the correct function name to getVariableInfo", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "input"}, "input"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["MySpecialFunc"]};
		var capturedName;
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					capturedName = name;
					return {
						text: "ok",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(capturedName).toBe("MySpecialFunc");
	});

	it("should pass source function to getVariableInfo options", function() {
		var mySource = function(callback) { callback({title: "t"}, "t"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["fn"]};
		var capturedSource;
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					capturedSource = opts.source;
					return {
						text: "ok",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		rrfuncModule.rrfunc(mySource, operator, options);
		expect(capturedSource).toBe(mySource);
	});

	it("should return empty params array when only function name is given", function() {
		var source = function(callback) { callback({title: "t"}, "t"); };
		var operator = {operands: ["fn"]};
		var capturedParams;
		var options = {
			widget: {
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					capturedParams = opts.params;
					return {
						text: "ok",
						srcVariable: {isFunctionDefinition: true}
					};
				}
			}
		};
		rrfuncModule.rrfunc(source, operator, options);
		expect(capturedParams).toEqual([]);
	});
});

title: $:/plugins/rimir/typed/test/test-rrt-filter.js
type: application/javascript
tags: [[$:/tags/test-spec]]

Tests for typed rrt-filter filter operator.

\*/
"use strict";

describe("typed: rrt-filter operator", function() {

	var rrtFilterModule;

	beforeEach(function() {
		rrtFilterModule = require("$:/plugins/rimir/typed/modules/filters/rrt-filter.js");
	});

	function makeSource(titles) {
		return function(callback) {
			for(var i = 0; i < titles.length; i++) {
				var title = titles[i];
				callback(title.tiddler || null, title.title || title);
			}
		};
	}

	function makeSourceSimple(titlesArray) {
		return function(callback) {
			for(var i = 0; i < titlesArray.length; i++) {
				callback(null, titlesArray[i]);
			}
		};
	}

	it("should export the rrt-filter function", function() {
		expect(rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"]).toBeDefined();
		expect(typeof rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"]).toBe("function");
	});

	it("should pass all titles through when widget is null", function() {
		var source = makeSourceSimple(["A", "B", "C"]);
		var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
		var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: null, wiki: null});
		expect(result).toEqual(["A", "B", "C"]);
	});

	it("should pass all titles through when filterState is empty", function() {
		var source = makeSourceSimple(["A", "B"]);
		var operator = {operand: ""};
		var widget = {getVariable: function() { return "task"; }};
		var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: new $tw.Wiki()});
		expect(result).toEqual(["A", "B"]);
	});

	it("should pass all titles through when type-key variable is missing", function() {
		var source = makeSourceSimple(["A", "B"]);
		var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
		var widget = {getVariable: function() { return undefined; }};
		var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: new $tw.Wiki()});
		expect(result).toEqual(["A", "B"]);
	});

	it("should pass all titles through when type tiddler not found", function() {
		var wiki = new $tw.Wiki();
		var source = makeSourceSimple(["A", "B"]);
		var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
		var widget = {
			getVariable: function() { return "nonexistent"; },
			getVariableInfo: function() { return {resultList: []}; }
		};
		var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
		expect(result).toEqual(["A", "B"]);
	});

	describe("with full wiki setup", function() {
		var wiki, widget;

		beforeEach(function() {
			wiki = new $tw.Wiki();
			wiki.addIndexersToWiki();

			// Type definition for "task"
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Type: Task", "rrt.type": "type", key: "task", text: ""});

			// Field definitions
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Field: Name", "rrt.type": "field", key: "name", typed: "text"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Field: Status", "rrt.type": "field", key: "status", typed: "enum:open closed"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Field: Owner", "rrt.type": "field", key: "owner", typed: "reference"});

			// Test data tiddlers
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Task1", "rrt.type": "task", name: "Fix login bug", status: "open", owner: "Alice"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Task2", "rrt.type": "task", name: "Add dashboard", status: "closed", owner: "Bob"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Task3", "rrt.type": "task", name: "Update login page", status: "open", owner: "Alice Bob"});

			widget = {
				getVariable: function(name) {
					if(name === "type-key") return "task";
					return undefined;
				},
				getVariableInfo: function(name, opts) {
					if(name === "rrt.fields") {
						return {resultList: ["name", "status", "owner"]};
					}
					return null;
				}
			};
		});

		function sourceWithTiddlers(titles) {
			return function(callback) {
				for(var i = 0; i < titles.length; i++) {
					var t = wiki.getTiddler(titles[i]);
					callback(t, titles[i]);
				}
			};
		}

		it("should pass all through when no filter state tiddlers exist", function() {
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should filter by text substring (3+ chars)", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/name", text: "login"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should skip text filter shorter than 3 chars", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/name", text: "lo"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should be case-insensitive for text search", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/name", text: "LOGIN"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should filter by enum field (exact match from selected values)", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/status", text: "open"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should filter by enum with multiple selected values", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/status", text: "open closed"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should filter by reference field (any match)", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/owner", text: "Alice"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should match reference when item has space-separated values", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/owner", text: "Bob"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task2", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should combine multiple filters with AND logic", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/status", text: "open"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/owner", text: "Alice"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should skip blank filter values", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/name", text: "   "});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1", "Task2", "Task3"]);
		});

		it("should exclude items with empty field value for enum filter", function() {
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "Task4", "rrt.type": "task", name: "No status", status: "", owner: "Carol"});
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/status", text: "open"});
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1", "Task4"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1"]);
		});

		it("should handle tiddler not in wiki gracefully via source callback", function() {
			var source = function(callback) {
				callback(null, "NonExistent");
				callback(wiki.getTiddler("Task1"), "Task1");
			};
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/status", text: "open"});
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: widget, wiki: wiki});
			expect(result).toEqual(["Task1"]);
		});

		it("should handle field definition not found (defaults to text type)", function() {
			// Add a filter state for a field that has no definition tiddler
			wiki.addTiddler({title: "$:/state/filter/unknown-field", text: "test"});
			// Widget returns field list including unknown-field
			var customWidget = {
				getVariable: function(name) {
					if(name === "type-key") return "task";
					return undefined;
				},
				getVariableInfo: function(name) {
					if(name === "rrt.fields") {
						return {resultList: ["unknown-field"]};
					}
					return null;
				}
			};
			var source = sourceWithTiddlers(["Task1"]);
			var operator = {operand: "$:/state/filter"};
			var result = rrtFilterModule["rrt-filter"](source, operator, {widget: customWidget, wiki: wiki});
			// "test" is 4 chars, Task1 doesn't have "unknown-field", so empty string doesn't contain "test"
			expect(result).toEqual([]);
		});
	});
});

","type":".info"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/validator","created":"20260305110750639","modified":"20260305110750639","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]]">
<$let type-field="rrt.type">

! Typed Validator

<$list filter="[function[_locate_rrt],[type]sort[key]]:filter[<currentTiddler>get[key]!prefix[_]]" variable="type-tid">
<$let type-key={{{[<type-tid>get[key]]}}}>
<$importvariables filter="[<type-key>][<type-tid>get[parent]]:map[function[_locate-type-tiddler],<currentTiddler>]">

!! <$text text={{{[<type-tid>get[icon]]}}}/> <$text text=<<type-key>>/> (<$count filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type<type-key>]"/>)

<%if [all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type<type-key>first[]]%>
<table class="rr-table">
<tr><th>Instance</th><th>Field</th><th>Violation</th><th>Detail</th></tr>
<$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type<type-key>sort[title]]">
<$let target-tid=<<currentTiddler>>>
<$list filter="[enlist<rrt.fields>]" variable="field-key">
<$let field-tid={{{[function[_locate-field-tiddler],<field-key>,<type-key>]}}}>

<%if [function[_field-length-blocks],<field-key>,<type-key>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-error"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>min length (blocking)</td><td>need <$text text={{{[function[_get-blocking-min],<field-key>,<type-key>]}}}/>+ chars, have <$text text={{{[function[_field-value-length],<field-key>]}}}/></td></tr>
<%endif%>

<%if [function[_field-length-warns],<field-key>,<type-key>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-warn"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>min length (warning)</td><td>recommend <$text text={{{[function[_get-warning-min],<field-key>,<type-key>]}}}/>+ chars, have <$text text={{{[function[_field-value-length],<field-key>]}}}/></td></tr>
<%endif%>

<%if [function[_field-unique-blocks],<field-key>,<type-key>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-error"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>uniqueness (blocking)</td><td>duplicate: "<$text text={{{[function[_field-duplicates],<field-key>,<type-key>join[, ]]}}}/>"</td></tr>
<%endif%>

<%if [function[_field-unique-warns],<field-key>,<type-key>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-warn"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>uniqueness (warning)</td><td>duplicate: "<$text text={{{[function[_field-duplicates],<field-key>,<type-key>join[, ]]}}}/>"</td></tr>
<%endif%>

<%if [<field-tid>get[typed]match[$title]]%>
<%if [function[_calculated]!match<target-tid>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-error"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>title mismatch</td><td>expected "<<_calculated>>", actual "<$text text=<<target-tid>>/>"</td></tr>
<%endif%>
<%endif%>

<%if [<field-tid>get[typed]match[$calculated]]%>
<%if [function[_calculated]]:filter[<target-tid>get<field-key>!match<currentTiddler>] +[first[]]%>
<tr class="rr-row-warn"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>calculated mismatch</td><td>expected "<<_calculated>>", stored "<$text text={{{[<target-tid>get<field-key>]}}}/>"</td></tr>
<%endif%>
<%endif%>

<%if [function[_field-nest-blocks],<field-key>,<type-key>]%>
<tr class="rr-row-error"><td><$link to=<<target-tid>>><$text text={{{[<target-tid>split[/]last[]]}}}/></$link></td><td><<field-key>></td><td>nesting depth (blocking)</td><td>max <$text text={{{[function[_get-nest-limit],<field-key>,<type-key>]}}}/>-level nesting exceeded</td></tr>
<%endif%>

</$let>
</$list>
</$let>
</$list>
</table>
<%else%>
//No instances//
<%endif%>

</$importvariables>
</$let>
</$list>

</$let>
</$importvariables>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-fields":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-fields","created":"20260305110750644","list-after":"$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/title","modified":"20260305110750644","tags":"$:/tags/ViewTemplate","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function _fieldbar-shorten(val) [<val>splitregexp[]first<fieldbar-max-length>join[]addsuffix[...]]
\function _fieldbar-display(val) [<val>length[]compare:integer:gt<fieldbar-max-length>] :map[function[_fieldbar-shorten],<val>] ~[<val>]
\function _fieldbar-resolve-ref(val) [<val>get{$:/config/rimir/typed/pill-display}!is[blank]] ~[<val>]

<%if [<currentTiddler>has[rrt.type]]%>
<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]]">
<$let
	type-field="rrt.type"
	type-key={{{[<currentTiddler>get[rrt.type]]}}}
	target-tid=<<currentTiddler>>
	fieldbar-max-length="15"
>
<$let type-tid={{{[function[_locate-type-tiddler],<type-key>]}}}>
<$importvariables filter="[<type-key>][<type-tid>get[parent]]:map[function[_locate-type-tiddler],<currentTiddler>]">

<div class="rrt-field-bar">
<$list filter="[enlist<rrt.fields>]" variable="field-key">
<$let
	field-tid={{{[function[_locate-field-tiddler],<field-key>,<type-key>]}}}
	popup-state={{{[<currentTiddler>addsuffix[/rrt-fieldbar/]addsuffix<field-key>]}}}
>
<%if [<field-tid>get[typed]!match[$title]!match[$calculated]]%>
<span class="rrt-field-cell tc-popup-keep">
<$button popup=<<popup-state>> class="tc-btn-invisible rrt-field-cell-btn" tooltip={{{[<field-tid>get[caption]]}}}>
<$text text={{{[<field-tid>get[icon]]}}}/> <$text text={{{[<currentTiddler>get<field-key>]:map[function[_fieldbar-resolve-ref],<currentTiddler>]:map[function[_fieldbar-display],<currentTiddler>]}}}/>
</$button>
</span>
<$reveal state=<<popup-state>> type="popup" position="belowleft" animate="yes" class="tc-popup-keep">
<div class="tc-drop-down rrt-field-popup">
<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/field-editor"/>
</div>
</$reveal>
<%endif%>
</$let>
</$list>
</div>

</$importvariables>
</$let>
</$let>
</$importvariables>
<%endif%>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/typed/viewtemplate-styles","created":"20260305110750644","modified":"20260305110750644","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".rrt-field-bar {
	float: right;
	display: flex;
	gap: 4px;
	font-size: 0.85em;
	margin: 0 0 4px 8px;
}

.rrt-field-cell-btn {
	border: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-controls-foreground>>;
	border-radius: 4px;
	padding: 2px 6px;
	cursor: pointer;
	white-space: nowrap;
	background: transparent;
}

.rrt-field-cell-btn:hover {
	background: <<colour tiddler-controls-foreground-hover>>;
	color: <<colour background>>;
}

.rrt-field-popup {
	padding: 8px;
	min-width: 200px;
}
"}}}
